TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-lazy-daughter_Hanaivaz
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mihumisang natahu saikin mas itu habasan mailantangus tu palihabasan.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ natax~χu saikin mas itu x~χabasan mail~ɬantaŋus tu pal~ɬix~χabasan.
S.FORM: mihumisang natahu saikin mas itu habasan mailantangus tu palihabasan.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ natax~χu saikin mas itu x~χabasan mail~ɬantaŋus tu pal~ɬix~χabasan.
S.TRANSL: 大家好,我要說的是很久以前的祖先的傳說故事.
Hello, I want to talk about a legendary story from long ago.

S.FORM: habasang aizadau pali'uni mas tupa tu aiza maza makasa tu pinilumah masmuav tu malaitaz mais kuzakuza masmuav tu makasa at.
S.PHON: x~χabasaŋ aiðadau pal~ɬiʔuni mas tupa tu aiða maða makasa tu pinil~ɬumax~χ masmuav tu mal~ɬaitað mais kuðakuða masmuav tu makasa at.
S.FORM: habasang aizadau pali'uni mas tupa tu aiza maza makasa tu pinilumah masmuav tu malaitaz mais kuzakuza masmuav tu makasa at.
S.PHON: x~χabasaŋ aiðadau pal~ɬiʔuni mas tupa tu aiða maða makasa tu pinil~ɬumax~χ masmuav tu mal~ɬaitað mais kuðakuða masmuav tu makasa at.
S.TRANSL: 很久以前有一個傳說說,有那個懶惰的媳婦,做甚麼工作動作非常慢.
A long time ago, there was a legend that said there was a very lazy daughter-in-law who did work slowly.

S.FORM: aupa aska'aun mas mabananaz hai musuhis isiadaan min'uni mas hazam.
S.PHON: aupa askaʔaun mas mabananað x~χai musux~χis iɕiadaan minʔuni mas x~χaðam.
S.FORM: aupa aska'aun mas mabananaz hai musuhis isiadaan min'uni mas hazam.
S.PHON: aupa askaʔaun mas mabananað x~χai musux~χis iɕiadaan minʔuni mas x~χaðam.
S.TRANSL: 因為被丈夫休妻回[娘]家在路上變成鳥.
She had been chased away by her husband and turned in a bird on the road home.

S.FORM: maupacin tu.
S.PHON: maupaʨin tu.
S.FORM: maupacin tu.
S.PHON: maupaʨin tu.
S.TRANSL: 是這樣的.
That's how it is.

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian aiza tacini maza sia tu pinilumah.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu x~χanian aiða taʨini maða ɕia tu pinil~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian aiza tacini maza sia tu pinilumah.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu x~χanian aiða taʨini maða ɕia tu pinil~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 有一天 有一個媳婦.
One day, there was a daughter-in-law.

S.FORM: aupa maza habasang bunun hai mais taunasian sia kamamaduh hai masmuav tu talpatazundaingaz maisicingmut sausanavan asa tu malmananu kamaduh at.
S.PHON: aupa maða x~χabasaŋ bunun x~χai mais taunaɕian ɕia kamamadux~χ x~χai masmuav tu tal~ɬpataðundaiŋað maiɕiʨiŋmut sausanavan asa tu mal~ɬmananu kamadux~χ at.
S.FORM: aupa maza habasang bunun hai mais taunasian sia kamamaduh hai masmuav tu talpatazundaingaz maisicingmut sausanavan asa tu malmananu kamaduh at.
S.PHON: aupa maða x~χabasaŋ bunun x~χai mais taunaɕian ɕia kamamadux~χ x~χai masmuav tu tal~ɬpataðundaiŋað maiɕiʨiŋmut sausanavan asa tu mal~ɬmananu kamadux~χ at.
S.TRANSL: 因為過去的人 布農族人,如果到了採收小米的季節,會從早到晚非常忙碌.
The early Bunun people were very busy all the day when it was the season for harvesting millet.

S.FORM: nii tu mahtu islunghu mais hanian maun mas haising.
S.PHON: nii tu max~χtu isl~ɬuŋx~χu mais x~χanian maun mas x~χaiɕiŋ.
S.FORM: nii tu mahtu islunghu mais hanian maun mas haising.
S.PHON: nii tu max~χtu isl~ɬuŋx~χu mais x~χanian maun mas x~χaiɕiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 中午不能休息吃飯.
At midday they could not rest or eat.

S.FORM: ungat maza tainilumah tu taini tas tu lumah pinilumahcia hai aupa maza pinilumaha hai makasa at malaitaz at pilumahun saia mas kapinilumahan saicia.
S.PHON: uŋat maða tainil~ɬumax~χ tu taini tas tu l~ɬumax~χ pinil~ɬumax~χʨia x~χai aupa maða pinil~ɬumax~χa x~χai makasa at mal~ɬaitað at pil~ɬumax~χun saia mas kapinil~ɬumax~χan saiʨia.
S.FORM: ungat maza tainilumah tu taini tas tu lumah pinilumahcia hai aupa maza pinilumaha hai makasa at malaitaz at pilumahun saia mas kapinilumahan saicia.
S.PHON: uŋat maða tainil~ɬumax~χ tu taini tas tu l~ɬumax~χ pinil~ɬumax~χʨia x~χai aupa maða pinil~ɬumax~χa x~χai makasa at mal~ɬaitað at pil~ɬumax~χun saia mas kapinil~ɬumax~χan saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後,屬於媳婦的那一家的主人,因為媳婦懶惰又動作很慢,他的婆婆公公把她放在家裡.
Then, as for the master of the family of the daughter-in-law, because the daughter-in-law was lazy and slow, her in-laws made her stay at home.

W.TRANSL: 使役<完成貌>在-家=遠距.斜格
使役<完成貌>在-家=遠距.主格
做-使役<完成貌>在-家-處焦

S.FORM: tupaun saicia maza isaicia maza cina hai tupa mas pinilumahcia tu aip tu hanian hai naisia imita tu lumahan hai naminsuma amina bunun mindangaz kamaduh at ilumahacin kasu kasanus mapit'ia mas nakaunun mas kaimaduhcia mais sanavanin.
S.PHON: tupaun saiʨia maða isaiʨia maða ʨina x~χai tupa mas pinil~ɬumax~χʨia tu aip tu x~χanian x~χai naiɕia imita tu l~ɬumax~χan x~χai naminsuma amina bunun mindaŋað kamadux~χ at il~ɬumax~χaʨin kasu kasanus mapitʔia mas nakaunun mas kaimadux~χʨia mais sanavanin.
S.FORM: tupaun saicia maza isaicia maza cina hai tupa mas pinilumahcia tu aip tu hanian hai naisia imita tu lumahan hai naminsuma amina bunun mindangaz kamaduh at ilumahacin kasu kasanus mapit'ia mas nakaunun mas kaimaduhcia mais sanavanin.
S.PHON: tupaun saiʨia maða isaiʨia maða ʨina x~χai tupa mas pinil~ɬumax~χʨia tu aip tu x~χanian x~χai naiɕia imita tu l~ɬumax~χan x~χai naminsuma amina bunun mindaŋað kamadux~χ at il~ɬumax~χaʨin kasu kasanus mapitʔia mas nakaunun mas kaimadux~χʨia mais sanavanin.
S.TRANSL: 她的媽媽對媳婦說:「今天在我們的家人家都會來幫忙收小米,然後,你就在家裡,你要先準備煮飯要給幫我們收小米的人吃晚餐.」

Her mother-in-law told her "Today everybody is going to help out harvesting millet. So, you stay at home. You first have to prepare the evening meal for the people who are helping us harvesting millet."

W.TRANSL: 使役<完成貌>在-家=遠距.斜格
做<完成貌>小米=遠距.斜格

S.FORM: at ispunastu mas cina tu dusa tu tapaz mas maduh tu tas tu hanian hai aminava sain mabazu at kanahtungin mabazu mas cilastan izav mapastala mas kamaduh tu tais'an at dusa tu maupacia saia maskalun at.
S.PHON: at ispunastu mas ʨina tu dusa tu tapað mas madux~χ tu tas tu x~χanian x~χai aminava sain mabaðu at kanax~χtuŋin mabaðu mas ʨil~ɬastan iðav mapastal~ɬa mas kamadux~χ tu taisʔan at dusa tu maupaʨia saia maskal~ɬun at.
S.FORM: at ispunastu mas cina tu dusa tu tapaz mas maduh tu tas tu hanian hai aminava sain mabazu at kanahtungin mabazu mas cilastan izav mapastala mas kamaduh tu tais'an at dusa tu maupacia saia maskalun at.
S.PHON: at ispunastu mas ʨina tu dusa tu tapað mas madux~χ tu tas tu x~χanian x~χai aminava sain mabaðu at kanax~χtuŋin mabaðu mas ʨil~ɬastan iðav mapastal~ɬa mas kamadux~χ tu taisʔan at dusa tu maupaʨia saia maskal~ɬun at.
S.TRANSL: 那個媽媽幫他拿兩串的小米放在地上,交代這兩個事情︰「你這一天你要搗米,搗完米後要煮飯等採收小米的親戚哦!」

The mother-in-law helped her put two strings of millet on the floor, ordering two things: "Today you need to finish pounding millet and then cook them and wait for cousins that are harvesting millet."

S.FORM: mudaan amin saicia mabananaz malavi amin mudaan kamaduh.
S.PHON: mudaan amin saiʨia mabananað mal~ɬavi amin mudaan kamadux~χ.
S.FORM: mudaan amin saicia mabananaz malavi amin mudaan kamaduh.
S.PHON: mudaan amin saiʨia mabananað mal~ɬavi amin mudaan kamadux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他的丈夫也是這樣一起去要收小米.
Her husband also went along with all of them to harvest millet.

S.FORM: at ilumah a maza sia tu pinilumaha tuza tu sadu saia tu aiu dusa tu tapaz a maza sia tu nabazuan a maduh.
S.PHON: at il~ɬumax~χ a maða ɕia tu pinil~ɬumax~χa tuða tu sadu saia tu aiu dusa tu tapað a maða ɕia tu nabaðuan a madux~χ.
S.FORM: at ilumah a maza sia tu pinilumaha tuza tu sadu saia tu aiu dusa tu tapaz a maza sia tu nabazuan a maduh.
S.PHON: at il~ɬumax~χ a maða ɕia tu pinil~ɬumax~χa tuða tu sadu saia tu aiu dusa tu tapað a maða ɕia tu nabaðuan a madux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 那個媳婦就真的留在家.她看著說:「 唉唷,有兩把要搗的小米.」
And the daughter-in-law really stayed at home, looking and saying: "Oh my God, two strings of millet to be pounded."

W.TRANSL: 使役<完成貌>在-家=遠距.主格

S.FORM: at daukdaukun saicia ma'u'ulmik mabazu haitu aupa saia hai malaitaz tu bunun ka nii tu iskua mabazu.
S.PHON: at daukdaukun saiʨia maʔuʔul~ɬmik mabaðu x~χaitu aupa saia x~χai mal~ɬaitað tu bunun ka nii tu iskua mabaðu.
S.FORM: at daukdaukun saicia ma'u'ulmik mabazu haitu aupa saia hai malaitaz tu bunun ka nii tu iskua mabazu.
S.PHON: at daukdaukun saiʨia maʔuʔul~ɬmik mabaðu x~χaitu aupa saia x~χai mal~ɬaitað tu bunun ka nii tu iskua mabaðu.
S.TRANSL: 她慢慢的踩稻舂米,但是因為她是一個很慢的人,所以她沒有搗完.
She was stomping the rice very slowly. However, because she was a very slow people, she didn't finish it.

S.FORM: tas tu mintaunghuin a vali hai mikui niiang aminun a tas tu maitasa tapaz a ma'ulan.
S.PHON: tas tu mintauŋx~χuin a val~ɬi x~χai mikui niiaŋ aminun a tas tu maitasa tapað a maʔul~ɬan.
S.FORM: tas tu mintaunghuin a vali hai mikui niiang aminun a tas tu maitasa tapaz a ma'ulan.
S.PHON: tas tu mintauŋx~χuin a val~ɬi x~χai mikui niiaŋ aminun a tas tu maitasa tapað a maʔul~ɬan.
S.TRANSL: 正中午了,她連一把也沒剝完.
It already got to the noon but she hadn't even finished stripping one string.

S.FORM: at namikui namapit'iin mais us'upin mungaabin namansanavan asa tu kanahtunganin a maza cilasa mabazu napit'iunin naminsumin a kaimaduh bunun hai mikui niiang aminun at.
S.PHON: at namikui namapitʔiin mais usʔupin muŋaabin namansanavan asa tu kanax~χtuŋanin a maða ʨil~ɬasa mabaðu napitʔiunin naminsumin a kaimadux~χ bunun x~χai mikui niiaŋ aminun at.
S.FORM: at namikui namapit'iin mais us'upin mungaabin namansanavan asa tu kanahtunganin a maza cilasa mabazu napit'iunin naminsumin a kaimaduh bunun hai mikui niiang aminun at.
S.PHON: at namikui namapitʔiin mais usʔupin muŋaabin namansanavan asa tu kanax~χtuŋanin a maða ʨil~ɬasa mabaðu napitʔiunin naminsumin a kaimadux~χ bunun x~χai mikui niiaŋ aminun at.
S.TRANSL: 要怎麼辦?大約快要傍晚了,要結束了,因為要煮好搗好的米了,收小米的人要來了.還沒弄完怎麼辦?
How was she going to have cooked if it was getting close to evening? she needed to finish pounding and cooking the rice because the harvesters were about coming. But what to do? it wasn't finished.

W.TRANSL: 非實現=主焦-煮=改變狀態
非實現=主焦-來=改變狀態

S.FORM: macimananu saia mababazu hai namikui.
S.PHON: maʨimananu saia mababaðu x~χai namikui.
S.FORM: macimananu saia mababazu hai namikui.
S.PHON: maʨimananu saia mababaðu x~χai namikui.
S.TRANSL: 她很用力一直稻米,但怎麼?
She pounded the rice very strongly, but how?

S.FORM: aupa ka malaitaz tu maluspingaz masmuav tu suluataz.
S.PHON: aupa ka mal~ɬaitað tu mal~ɬuspiŋað masmuav tu sul~ɬuatað.
S.FORM: aupa ka malaitaz tu maluspingaz masmuav tu suluataz.
S.PHON: aupa ka mal~ɬaitað tu mal~ɬuspiŋað masmuav tu sul~ɬuatað.
S.TRANSL: 因為超懶的女生太過分了.
Because the superlazy girl is completely over the top.

S.FORM: at mabaintaz kuzakuza hai.
S.PHON: at mabaintað kuðakuða x~χai.
S.FORM: at mabaintaz kuzakuza hai.
S.PHON: at mabaintað kuðakuða x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 而且工作慢.
And she works slowly.

S.FORM: sanavanin hai niiang lanahtung mabazu mas tas tu tapaz tu maduh tu.
S.PHON: sanavanin x~χai niiaŋ l~ɬanax~χtuŋ mabaðu mas tas tu tapað tu madux~χ tu.
S.FORM: sanavanin hai niiang lanahtung mabazu mas tas tu tapaz tu maduh tu.
S.PHON: sanavanin x~χai niiaŋ l~ɬanax~χtuŋ mabaðu mas tas tu tapað tu madux~χ tu.
S.TRANSL: 傍晚,她還是沒搗完一把串米.
By the evening, she still hadn't finished pounding one string of rice.

S.FORM: pinunastu mas cina tu bazuav.
S.PHON: pinunastu mas ʨina tu baðuav.
S.FORM: pinunastu mas cina tu bazuav.
S.PHON: pinunastu mas ʨina tu baðuav.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽辦下來的米飯.
The rice that mother had taken down.

S.FORM: at minsumin a maza kaimaduha bunun.
S.PHON: at minsumin a maða kaimadux~χa bunun.
S.FORM: at minsumin a maza kaimaduha bunun.
S.PHON: at minsumin a maða kaimadux~χa bunun.
S.TRANSL: 可是那些收小米的人就回家了.
But then the people who were harvesting came home.

W.TRANSL: 做<完成貌>小米=遠距.主格

S.FORM: maina'iav tu bunun minsuma amin tu nakulumahin maun.
S.PHON: mainaʔiav tu bunun minsuma amin tu nakul~ɬumax~χin maun.
S.FORM: maina'iav tu bunun minsuma amin tu nakulumahin maun.
S.PHON: mainaʔiav tu bunun minsuma amin tu nakul~ɬumax~χin maun.
S.TRANSL: 那些幫助的人都回家來吃飯.
All of the people helping farming came home to eat.

S.FORM: at kulumahin a cina.
S.PHON: at kul~ɬumax~χin a ʨina.
S.FORM: at kulumahin a cina.
S.PHON: at kul~ɬumax~χin a ʨina.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽進到家裡了.
And the mother came home.

S.FORM: lala'laun tu isa pinilumaha.
S.PHON: l~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaun tu isa pinil~ɬumax~χa.
S.FORM: lala'laun tu isa pinilumaha.
S.PHON: l~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaun tu isa pinil~ɬumax~χa.
S.TRANSL: 她一直大喊大叫:媳婦在那裡?
She kept shouting: where is the daughter-in-law?!

W.TRANSL: 使役<完成貌>在-家=遠距.主格

S.FORM: isa pinilumah isu a pinit'ia sinpastala tu nakaunun.
S.PHON: isa pinil~ɬumax~χ isu a pinitʔia ɕinpastal~ɬa tu nakaunun.
S.FORM: isa pinilumah isu a pinit'ia sinpastala tu nakaunun.
S.PHON: isa pinil~ɬumax~χ isu a pinitʔia ɕinpastal~ɬa tu nakaunun.
S.TRANSL: 媳婦,你為我們預備的飯在哪裡 ?
Daughter-in-law, where is the food you were told to cook?

S.FORM: minsumin a kaimina kaimaduh.
S.PHON: minsumin a kaimina kaimadux~χ.
S.FORM: minsumin a kaimina kaimaduh.
S.PHON: minsumin a kaimina kaimadux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 我們收小米的人回來了.
We the harvesters have come back.

S.FORM: masanmasauhdang amin a kaimaduha bunun.
S.PHON: masanmasaux~χdaŋ amin a kaimadux~χa bunun.
S.FORM: masanmasauhdang amin a kaimaduha bunun.
S.PHON: masanmasaux~χdaŋ amin a kaimadux~χa bunun.
S.TRANSL: 全部收小米的人都很餓了.
We are all very hungry.

W.TRANSL: 做<完成貌>-小米=遠距.主格

S.FORM: aupa habas Bunun mais kamaduh hai masamu islunghu at masamu maun.
S.PHON: aupa x~χabas bunun mais kamadux~χ x~χai masamu isl~ɬuŋx~χu at masamu maun.
S.FORM: aupa habas Bunun mais kamaduh hai masamu islunghu at masamu maun.
S.PHON: aupa x~χabas bunun mais kamadux~χ x~χai masamu isl~ɬuŋx~χu at masamu maun.
S.TRANSL: 因為以前的布農人收小米的時候,不能休息吃飯 .
Because the Bunun people from the past, when harvesting millet were not allowed to rest or eat.

S.FORM: asa tu ka kanahtung mas mapandailaz tu manatpu tu kamaduhan at aupa kulumah maun hai.
S.PHON: asa tu ka kanax~χtuŋ mas mapandail~ɬað tu manatpu tu kamadux~χan at aupa kul~ɬumax~χ maun x~χai.
S.FORM: asa tu ka kanahtung mas mapandailaz tu manatpu tu kamaduhan at aupa kulumah maun hai.
S.PHON: asa tu ka kanax~χtuŋ mas mapandail~ɬað tu manatpu tu kamadux~χan at aupa kul~ɬumax~χ maun x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 一定要先完成收整個行列的小米,才可以回家吃飯.
You need to finish harvesting the millet of a the whole row, before you can co home and eat.

S.FORM: kulumahin naia hai sadu a cina tu mikui makadava baning.
S.PHON: kul~ɬumax~χin naia x~χai sadu a ʨina tu mikui makadava baniŋ.
S.FORM: kulumahin naia hai sadu a cina tu mikui makadava baning.
S.PHON: kul~ɬumax~χin naia x~χai sadu a ʨina tu mikui makadava baniŋ.
S.TRANSL: 當他們到家裡了,媽媽看到 爐灶是冷的.
When they got home, the mother saw that the stove was cold.

S.FORM: uka pailu'ian a maza ngul'a sia tu napit'iaan.
S.PHON: uka pail~ɬuʔian a maða ŋul~ɬʔa ɕia tu napitʔiaan.
S.FORM: uka pailu'ian a maza ngul'a sia tu napit'iaan.
S.PHON: uka pail~ɬuʔian a maða ŋul~ɬʔa ɕia tu napitʔiaan.
S.TRANSL: 沒有鍋子在廚房.
There was no pot on the fire.

S.FORM: kudii sadu hai ai maza nusunga ka malmiing a maduh niiang aminun mabazu.
S.PHON: kudii sadu x~χai ai maða nusuŋa ka mal~ɬmiiŋ a madux~χ niiaŋ aminun mabaðu.
S.FORM: kudii sadu hai ai maza nusunga ka malmiing a maduh niiang aminun mabazu.
S.PHON: kudii sadu x~χai ai maða nusuŋa ka mal~ɬmiiŋ a madux~χ niiaŋ aminun mabaðu.
S.TRANSL: 她過去看,哎,臼裡面藏著未舂的小米!
She went over and saw, ai, in the mortar the unpounded millet was hidden.

S.FORM: namaza kaunun namaza pinit'ia.
S.PHON: namaða kaunun namaða pinitʔia.
S.FORM: namaza kaunun namaza pinit'ia.
S.PHON: namaða kaunun namaða pinitʔia.
S.TRANSL: 要吃什麼,有什麼煮好了?
What to eat? What was cooked then?

S.FORM: lala'laun a maza sia tu pinilumah hai ka adii valavala.

the mother was sad and went home, but…

Up until now, that daughter-in-law that had become a bird is being called the "lapus 'ang'ang" by the Bunun people.
